heading: SECRETARY OF THE NAVY: MISCELLANEOUS POWERS AND DUTIES
label: 861 SECRETARY OF THE NAVY: MISCELLANEOUS POWERS AND DUTIES
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior chapter 861, consisting of sections 8811 to 8820, related to separation from service within the Air Force for various reasons, prior to renumbering as chapter 939 of this title.
